title: telis procumbens
side_effects: Telis procumbens can have side effects if used improperly, such as diarrhea, stomach cramps, and nausea, due to its high content of alkaloids and glycosides. In extreme cases, prolonged consumption can lead to liver damage and kidney problems. Some individuals may also experience allergic reactions, such as skin irritation, respiratory issues, or anaphylaxis, especially if they have a pre-existing condition. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using telis procumbens for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
